raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblymember Dr. Joaquin Arambula secured General Funds in the State Budget for the City of Fowler and the Fowler Improvement Association.",
    "The allocation of $4 million will help the City of Fowler build a new Police Department headquarters and Senior Center.",
    "The allocation of $1 million will help the Fowler Improvement Association renovate its historic 112-year-old clubhouse.",
    "The current Police Department in Fowler is housed in a section of City Hall that lacks adequate facilities including locker rooms and training space.",
    "The current Senior Center in Fowler is undersized and presents access challenges for seniors.",
    "The clubhouse of the Fowler Improvement Association is the only building in Fowler designated as a historical property by the County of Fresno.",
    "The funding will allow the City of Fowler to better serve its community and improve public safety services.",
    "The new funding will allow for a co-location of the Senior Center and the Police Department, which could enhance community trust in law enforcement.",
    "The new state-of-the-art senior center will significantly impact the lives of seniors in the community."
  ]
}
```
